title: Yomin Metal Deep Processing Machine
description: One integrated brass and aluminum busbar production line — not three separate machines. Material flows through deep row processing (cutting, drilling, tapping, chamfering), automatic screw tightening and testing, then rotary metal finishing on a turntable station. Each stage is PLC-controlled with a touch screen; layout and parameters are customized to your drawings or samples.

specs.Production Stages: 3 — deep processing → screw tightening → rotary finishing
specs.Materials: Brass and aluminum busbar rows / terminals
specs.Control: Touch screen + PLC (Taiwan Weilun) per station
specs.Customization: Professional customization per drawings or samples

processes.title: Deep Processing Machine for Brass and Aluminum Row
processes.title_zh: 黄铜排 / 铝排深加工设备
processes.description: Automatic compound machining center integrating cutting, drilling, tapping and chamfering for deep processing of brass and aluminum busbar rows. Horizontal PLC-controlled machine with touch screen — conventional products, different hole sizes, aluminum profiles and double-row holes can be customized.

processes.title: Screw Tightening Machine
processes.description: Vertical automatic screwing machine integrating screwing and testing for brass bar assembly. Replaces manual labor with high efficiency, strong reliability and long service life. Conveyor-fed station for pre-drilled busbars — custom screw-driving layouts available.

processes.title: Circulating Rotary Metalworking Machine
processes.title_zh: 转盘式金属深加工加工机器
processes.description: Vertical metal deep processing machine with turntable flow structure integrating cutting, tapping, drilling and chamfering for semi-finished copper and aluminum parts. High efficiency, strong reliability and long service life.
